projectDescription: An Islamic Arabic text editor with Quran verse autocomplete, document management, and multi-format export capabilities.
keyFeatures: Rich Arabic text editor with full RTL support
Quran verse autocomplete via slash commands
Multi-page document management with IndexedDB persistence
Export to PDF, HTML, JSON, and Markdown
Text formatting: bold, italic, underline, font size, alignment
Pin favorite documents in the sidebar
Amiri Arabic font for authentic Islamic typography
publicApiSurface: exportToJSON(content, pageName) — export editor content as JSON
exportToHTML(content, pageName) — export editor content as HTML
exportToMarkdown(content, pageName) — export editor content as Markdown
exportToPDF(content, pageName) — export editor content as PDF via print dialog
db.pages — IndexedDB table for document storage (id, name, description, content, createdAt, updatedAt, isPinned)
editorPlugins — PlateJS plugin array (Bold, Italic, Underline, Align, Slash, Font)
usePages() — React hook returning live array of all pages
